revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Banner_holder%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Banner shell related}} == Usage == To group multiple banners, such as merge histories, into a box, and optionally collapse them into one banner to save vertical space. ===Basic syntax=== {{Banner holder | {{First banner}} {{Second banner}} {{Third banner}} ... }} ===All parameters=== {{Banner holder |collapsed=yes |text=Some text here |image=someicon.jpog |size=48 | {{First banner}} {{Second banner}} {{Third banner}} ... }} Note that the vertical bar (|) at the end of the first line must be included. ====Optional parameters==== # Adding {{para|collapsed|yes}} will cause the outer table to be collapsed, hiding the banners. Adding {{para|collapsed|no}} (the default) will cause the outer table not to be collapsed, showing the banners. # Adding {{para|text|some string...}} will cause the collapse bar title to be altered to ''some string''. If left blank or not used, the default string is ''Other talkpage banners.''. # Adding {{para|image|file name}} (not including the 'Image:' or 'File' prefix) changes the puzzle piece to the specified image. # Adding {{para|size|number}} changes the size of the image icon to the number of pixels specified. {{gallery |mode=nolines |noborder=yes |title=Some icons which might be useful as images |height=27 |width=60 |File:Splitsection.svg| |File:Merge-split-transwiki default.svg| |File:Merge-arrow-3.svg| |File:Merge-arrow 2.svg| |File:OOjs UI icon language-ltr.svg| |File:Translate (CoreUI Icons v1.0.0).svg| |File:Translation_to_english_arrow.svg| }} ==Examples== This example shows a banner holder grouping multiple {{tl|Copied}} and {{tl|Translated page}} templates, with an altered image icon: {{Banner holder |collapsed=yes |text=This page contains text [[WP:CWW|copied]] or [[WP:TFOLWP|translated]] from other articles |image=Merge-arrow-3.svg |size=36 | {{Copied |from=SRC |from_oldid=rev |to=DEST |to_diff=dest-rev |to_oldid=prev-rev |date=DATE}} {{translated page|de|ICE 1|version=45565777|insertversion=210289191}} }} and generates: {{Banner holder |collapsed=yes |text=This page contains text [[WP:CWW|copied]] or [[WP:TFOLWP|translated]] from other articles |image=Merge-arrow-3.svg |size=36 | {{Copied |from=SRC |from_oldid=rev |to=DEST |to_diff=destrev |to_oldid=prev-rev |date=DATE}} {{translated page|de|ICE 1|version=45565777|insertversion=210289191|nocat=true}} }} ==Choosing banners to collapse== The choice of which banners to collapse is left up to editors' discretion. Some banners have dedicated collapse headers, such as: * WikiProjects {{snd}}{{tl|WikiProject banner shell}} * Redirect categories{{snd}}{{tl|Redirect category shell}} * {{tl|On this day}} templates{{snd}}self-collapsing ==See also== * {{tl|Article history}} – For a template to condense Peer Reviews and other Good- or Featured-article history * {{tl|Old XfD multi}} – For listing multiple deletion debates * {{tl|Skip to talk}} – To skip past the many banners and templates straight to the table of contents * {{tl|Talk page header}} – Used at the top of some pages * Other banner shells: ** {{tl|WikiProject banner shell}} – for [[:Category:WikiProject templates|WikiProject banners]] ** {{tl|Redirect category shell}} – For [[:Category:Redirect templates|Redirect templates]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Non-subject-matter-related article-talk header templates]] [[Category:WikiProject banner templates]] [[Category:Template shell templates]] [[Category:Templates that are not mobile friendly]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
